commentary_links.hebrew: וְאֶת־הָאַ֜יִל יַעֲשֶׂ֨ה זֶ֤בַח שְׁלָמִים֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה עַ֖ל סַ֣ל הַמַּצּ֑וֹת וְעָשָׂה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן אֶת־מִנְחָת֖וֹ וְאֶת־נִסְכּֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: He shall offer the ram as a sacrifice of well-being to G<small>OD</small>, together with the basket of unleavened cakes; the priest shall also offer the grain offerings and the libations.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: זבח שלמים לה על סל המצות למימרא
